title: AppGroup
description: A group of developers and their applications.

name.description: Output only. Resource name of the app group.

appGroupId.description: Output only. Internal ID of the app group.

displayName.description: Display name of the app group.

channelUri.description: URI of the communication channel for the group.

attributes.description: Custom attributes for the app group.

createdAt.description: Output only. Time the app group was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Time the app group was last modified.
